sso.note: Leave tenantId/clientId blank for the demo e-mail sign-in. Fill BOTH with your Entra App registration GUIDs to require real Microsoft Entra ID id_token validation (see deploy/ENTRA-SSO-SETUP.md).

businessCentral.note: Set enabled=true and confirm the published OData service that holds the print Job# + item. Adapter runs server-side (on-prem server can reach BC).

notify.note: Paste a Teams Incoming Webhook URL and/or SMTP details to enable hold/reject alerts and the manager digest. secure=true uses implicit TLS (port 465); secure=false uses STARTTLS (port 587). Leave user/pass blank for an unauthenticated relay.

tolerances.note: Used for auto pass/fail flags. Edit in Admin > Tolerances.

storage.note: driver 'json' (default) writes data/db.json. Set 'sqlite' to use the built-in node:sqlite store at storage.path (requires Node 22.5+; falls back to JSON automatically if unavailable).

backup.note: Rotating copies of data/db.json into data/backups/. intervalMin = minutes between snapshots; keep = how many newest snapshots to retain.

security.note: Password-login throttle: after maxLoginFails wrong attempts (per username+IP) within windowMin minutes, that login is locked for lockMin minutes. In-memory; resets on restart.
